# Extração: 01-Course or Info Product Landing Page PDF

- **Fonte:** 01-Course or Info Product Landing Page PDF.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 0.09 MB

---

COURSE SALES PAGE TEMPLATE
Additional Notes:
● Use as many testimonials as you can throughout the page, below is just an example of
where to place them
● Make the copy sections as long as you need to sell the product. Some products won’t
require a long explanation while others will convert better with longer stories/copy
● Option to lead with a unique mechanism in the headline or full product name, might
depend if you’re using a video at the top or just images. When in doubt, always split test
:)
● Always recommend split testing headlines and leads
● Video testimonials can be very powerful but they can slow down page load times
[ATTENTION BAR] e.g. Calling All [AVATAR]
[HEADLINE]: e.g. Use the XYZ System/Method to
Generate More Sales Without (Pain Point #1), (Pain
Point #2), or (Pain Point #3)]
[SUBHEAD]: Find Out How Hundreds/Thousands of People Are (Achieving
Result) With This (Unique System/Method OR Lead with Product Name)!
[OPTIONAL: VIDEO INTRO
OR OFFER STACK IMAGE HERE]
AS SEEN IN:
[LOGO BAR]
[LEAD]
It’s Time to Stop/Say Goodbye to [BIGGEST PAIN POINT]
Dear [AVATAR],
- Talk about where they’re probably at right now
- What their struggles and pain points are
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

- RELATE to the reader with empathy
[SEGUE + TEASE]
The good news is, there’s finally a way to [RESOLVE THEIR PROBLEMS]
- Tease the solution but don’t reveal it completely (open loop)
- Explain that you’re going to reveal it in just a minute, but first let you introduce yourself…

- My name is XYZ
- Why I’m qualified to tell you about this
